chapter_title.en: Chapter on Livelihoods, Earnings, Profits, and Professions

text: 3646 - وَ نَهَى رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ عَنْ عَسِيبِ اَلْفَحْلِ وَ هُوَ أَجْرُ اَلضِّرَابِ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.3646 - The Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace be upon him and his family) forbade 'Aseeb Al-Fahl', which is the fee for the mating of a stallion.
